particulars.description: All that freehold property known as 23 somers road, rugby, CV22 7DG registered under title number WK92437.
A fixed and floating charge over all assets.

F/H 23 somers road rugby warwickshire t/n WK92437, with the benefit of all rights, licences, guarantees, rent deposits, contracts, deeds undertakings & warranties relating to the property. Any shares or membership rights in any management company for the property. Any goodwill of any business from time to time carried on at the property. Any rental & other money payable under any lease, licence or other interest created in respect of the property & all other payments whatever in respect of the property.

secured_details.description: All monies due or to become due from the company to the chargee on any account whatsoever
